prompt: A computer graphics visualization of instance segmentation: the figure from image 1 shown alongside a stack of denim jeans like in image 2, with distinct colored masks highlighting different object instances and parts.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics visualization of instance segmentation. The image should display the young girl from image 1 on the left, positioned alongside multiple stacks of folded denim jeans similar to those in image 2 on the right. Both the girl and the jeans should be distinctly overlaid with bright, varied colored masks highlighting different object instances and their specific parts.
objects: Young girl positioned on the left
Multiple stacks of folded denim jeans similar to image 2
Masks overlaid distinctly on the young girl
Masks overlaid distinctly on the folded denim jeans
Masks highlighting specific parts of objects
